word: H8601 - תֻּפִין - tuphîyn - too-feen' - Baked piece

sections.paragraph:
Original: תּפין

Transliteration: tûphı̂yn

Phonetic: too-feen'

BDB Definition:

  1. broken piece, baked pieces, pieces cooked
    1. meaning dubious

Origin: from H644

TWOT entry: 2533

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
